name.es: Pan de masa madre con semillas

description.en: A hearty, fiber-rich loaf built on flax, sesame, sunflower and fennel seeds, with a touch of semolina for a shatteringly crisp crust. Toasty, nutty and substantial, it makes a whole meal of buttered toast.
description.de: Ein herzhaftes, ballaststoffreiches Brot auf einem Bett aus Lein-, Sesam-, Sonnenblumen- und Fenchelsamen, mit etwas Hartweizengrieß für eine herrlich knusprige Kruste. Geröstet-nussig und kräftig – schon eine Scheibe mit Butter macht satt.
description.es: Un pan contundente y rico en fibra, construido sobre semillas de lino, sésamo, girasol e hinojo, con un toque de sémola para una corteza extraordinariamente crujiente. Tostado, con sabor a frutos secos y sustancioso: una tostada con mantequilla ya es una comida.
description.fr: Un pain généreux et riche en fibres, construit sur un lit de graines de lin, sésame, tournesol et fenouil, avec une pointe de semoule pour une croûte merveilleusement croustillante. Grillé-noisetté et consistant, une tartine beurrée suffit à faire un repas.

origin.note: A contemporary high-fiber formula from the artisan home-baking movement.

method.title: Build the levain and soak seeds
method.summary: Mix a small levain of bread and whole wheat flour, starter and water; ripen about 5 hours. Meanwhile soak flax, sesame and fennel seeds in hot water.

method.title: Autolyse
method.summary: Combine the bread flour, semolina, whole wheat flour and water; rest 1 hour.

method.title: Mix
method.summary: Slap-and-fold the autolysed dough with the ripe levain and salt for a few minutes.

method.title: Bulk ferment
method.summary: Over about 3.5 hours, give four stretch-and-fold sets 30 minutes apart, working in the drained seed soaker, raw sunflower seeds and lemon zest during the first set.

method.title: Shape and coat
method.summary: Divide, preshape, rest 30 minutes, then shape into a boule or bâtard and roll the surface in the reserved seed mix.

method.title: Cold proof
method.summary: Proof seam-side-up in the refrigerator overnight, about 14-15 hours.

method.title: Bake
method.summary: Bake in a preheated Dutch oven at 230°C: 20 minutes covered with steam, then 30-35 minutes uncovered until golden.

method.title: Cool
method.summary: Rest at least an hour before slicing.
